stock_photos.description: Search Pexels, save stock photos or videos into public/stock, update public/stock/manifest.json, and generate Remotion props with backgroundImage or backgroundVideo plus attribution.

query.description: Pexels search query, for example modern business team office.

media.description: Choose whether to download a stock photo or a stock video.

orientation.description: Use landscape for 16:9, portrait for 9:16, and square for 1:1.

size.description: For photos: original, large2x, large, medium, small. For videos: large, medium, small.

title.description: Optional Remotion title prop to write into the generated props file.

subtitle.description: Optional Remotion subtitle prop to write into the generated props file.

props.description: Path for the generated Remotion props JSON file.
